info.english_meaning: to be gather to be collected
info.hindI_arTa: ekatra honA ikaWWA karanA yA honA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: samavAyaH saNgamo miSraRam  samavAyaH = Ekyam iti kzIrasvAmI

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'uta yAsi savitastrIRi rocanota sUryasya raSmiBiH samucyasi' (f॰5.81.4) samucyasi=saNgacCase
'samanDasA madezu vA uvoca' (indraH) (f॰7.20.4) indro madezu madanimittezvanDasA somalakzaRenAnnena samuvoca samavEti samavAyaM saNgatiM kAmayata ityAha
'asAvi devaM gofjIkamanDo nyasminnindro januzemuvoca' (f0 7211) **nyuvoca paritozamApa saMgato'BUditi vA
'aBi vA eza etAnucyati yezAM pUrvAparA anvaYcaH pramIyante' (tE0 saM0 2225) aByucyati ABimuKyena samavEti ezognistAnrucivizayaM karoti sotsukaM mArgatIti saMskftaSArmaRyakozaH
